recent_excerpts: Vimeo attributed a security incident to a breach at analytics vendor Anodot; hackers accessed internal systems but not video content, logins, or payment data.
Attackers compromised the elementary-data PyPI package (1.1M monthly downloads) to push an infostealer targeting developer credentials, crypto wallets, and environment variables.
Vercel disclosed a breach after stolen OAuth tokens from Context.ai enabled unauthorized access to internal systems via a connected app. No customer data exposed.
